cleavage agent: digested overnight at 37 °C with 60 ng μl−1 trypsin
enrichment method: incubated with streptavidin beads coated with either a biotinylated EXOmiRNA
fractionation method: floated with centrifugation to equilibrium density into a sucrose gradient
instrument: on an LTQ XP Orbitrap mass spectrometer
ionization type: to an emitter nanospray needle for real time ionization
